name: gtm-engineering-command-center
description: Turn Claude Code into your autonomous GTM engineer. Includes the full GTM Creativity Atlas 2026 (130+ tactics). Plan media buys, generate ad creatives with Nano Banana 2 (Gemini), deploy campaigns via Meta Ads API, analyze metrics with PostHog, and run self-learning optimization loops.

plugins.name: gtm-engineering-command-center
plugins.description: Autonomous GTM Command Center — 10 slash commands, 5 specialized agents, 5 skills with 17 rules. Media planning, ad creative generation (Nano Banana 2), Meta Ads deployment (Graph API), PostHog analytics dashboards, self-learning loops, community intelligence scraping, and Remotion animated ads.
